CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar May-30-2018 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement And Have Case Placed Back On Active Civil Claendar
Off Calendar Mar-30-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF PORTFOLIO RECOVERY ASSOCIATES LLC'S Motion To Vacate Notice Of Settlement And Have Case Placed Back On Active Civil Calendar is granted. No opposition filed. Prevailing party shall prepare and submit a proposed order to the Court for signature. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976 (302/HK)
